svg.text: ① Composed, not custom — edu1 configures service1 + market1 with academy1 at its heart; built fast on proven products.
② Human educators decide — agents support & assist; teachers & staff decide all grading, admissions & assessment.
③ Integrity intact — supports learning; it does not do the work or enable cheating; it teaches, it doesn't hand answers.
④ Safe & protected — heightened care for minors; student data protected; age-appropriate, safeguarded by design.
⑤ Grounded & equitable — answers tie to approved curriculum; multilingual, accessible, fair across learners.
⑥ Outcome-led — support, engagement, access & faculty time, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
